fields.name: AMARON ABR-PR-12APBTX25 2.5 Ah Battery for Bike
fields.description: The AMARON ABR-PR-12APBTX25 is a high-quality 12V, 2.5Ah maintenance-free battery designed for motorcycles and scooters. Built with advanced VRLA (Valve Regulated Lead Acid) technology, it delivers reliable starting power, longer battery life, and consistent performance in all riding conditions. This compact and spill-proof battery offers excellent vibration resistance, making it ideal for daily commuting and rough road usage. With zero maintenance requirements and dependable performance, it ensures a hassle-free riding experience.
fields.headline: A trusted choice for riders looking for reliability, safety, and long-lasting performance.

fields.name: AMARON ABR-PR-APBTX4LB 4 Ah Battery for Bike
fields.description: The AMARON ABR-PR-APBTZ4L 3Ah Battery for Bike is a premium 12V, 3Ah maintenance-free battery engineered to deliver dependable starting power and long-lasting performance for motorcycles. Built using advanced VRLA (Valve Regulated Lead Acid) technology, it ensures consistent power output, enhanced durability, and superior reliability across varied riding conditions. Its compact, spill-proof design offers excellent resistance to vibration and heat, making it well-suited for daily commuting as well as challenging road conditions. With zero maintenance requirements, this battery eliminates the need for regular electrolyte checks, providing a truly hassle-free ownership experience. Designed for longevity and performance, the AMARON ABR-PR-APBTZ4L ensures smooth starts and reliable power every time you ride.
fields.headline: A trusted choice for riders looking for reliability, safety, and long-lasting performance.

fields.name: AMARON ABR-PR-12APBTX50 5 Ah Battery for Bike
fields.description: The AMARON ABR-PR-12APBTX50 5 Ah Battery for Bike is a high-performance, 12 V maintenance-free battery designed to deliver reliable starting power and consistent performance for motorcycles and scooters. Built with advanced VRLA (Valve Regulated Lead Acid) technology, this battery offers superior durability, excellent vibration resistance, and stable power output across various riding conditions — whether you’re navigating city streets or tackling rough roads.With its spill-proof, maintenance-free design, you can ride worry-free without the need for topping up fluids or frequent checks. Engineered for long life and dependable starts, the ABR-PR-12APBTX50 ensures smooth ignition, dependable performance, and a hassle-free ownership experience.
fields.headline: A trusted choice for riders looking for reliability, safety, and long-lasting performance.

fields.name: AMARON PRO Bike Rider 2 Wheeler Battery - APBTZ5L (ABR-PR-APBTZ5L) 5 Ah Battery for Bike
fields.description: The AMARON PRO APBTZ5L 5 Ah is a high-performance, maintenance-free 12V battery designed for two-wheeler riders who demand reliability and consistent power. Built with advanced VRLA (Valve Regulated Lead Acid) technology, this battery ensures excellent cranking power, longer life, and superior vibration resistance, making it ideal for both city commuting and rough road conditions.Its spill-proof, maintenance-free design eliminates the need for regular checks or fluid topping, providing a hassle-free ownership experience. Perfectly engineered for smooth ignition and dependable performance, the APBTZ5L guarantees a worry-free ride every time.
fields.headline: A trusted choice for riders looking for reliability, safety, and long-lasting performance.
